title: Control Alt Games Platform & Solo-Operator Workflow (Proscenium Stage, Vellum Vault, Eidolon Art, Mneme Lore, and Godot Runtimes)
problem: Solo game development across Control Alt Games requires operating as a creative director without manual developer bookkeeping or technical 3D pipeline friction. Today's systems (Vellum asset vault, Proscenium presentation stage, Eidolon concept art, Mneme lore library, LCARD operator controls, and Godot game repos) operate as isolated silos, requiring manual hand-offs, manual CLI commands, and lacking a unified solo-operator workflow across stage presentation, concept art, lore briefs, asset conversion, and automated engine delivery.
desired_outcome: A unified, machine-owned Control Alt Games platform and workflow where Vellum converts and vaults 3D/audio assets; Proscenium acts as the home presentation authority and live stage viewport; Eidolon and Mneme supply concept art and lore briefs; automated background sync delivers manifested assets directly into Field Ops and Threshold Affairs Godot repos on dev-ubuntu; and headless engine validation guarantees 0 import errors.
constraints: Field Ops (godot-field-ops) and Threshold Affairs (godot-threshold-affairs) are separate, independent game targets.
Proscenium (:8788) is the authoritative presentation stage, Hails engine, and display target router (overlay-apk / Android TV).
Vellum (:8770) stores bytes, not prose, and handles machine-owned 3D/ORM/Ogg/WebM conversion.
Vault I/O off the press host is strictly HTTP-only.
Pack intake, lane sync, and headless engine validation must be 100% machine-owned without operator bookkeeping.
Record all scope, context, and work in durable CFD records mirrored in git.
acceptance_signals: Governing CFD inspiration and plan are canonized in git.
Proscenium presentation actions and display adapters integrate with Control Alt Games lanes.
Machine-owned background sync delivers published Vellum assets directly to Field Ops and Threshold Affairs repos on dev-ubuntu.
Automated headless Godot import scanning (godot --headless) verifies 0 import errors and updates /api/ops/pulse.
Axiom Studio Leaf presents unified production briefs (Eidolon concept art + Mneme lore + Vellum assets + Proscenium stage preview).

non_negotiables: Keep Field Ops and Threshold Affairs completely independent
Proscenium owns presentation, Hails, and display target routing
Vellum owns 3D/ORM/Ogg asset conversion and vault storage
All pipeline delivery and engine verification must be machine-owned
rejected_approaches: Asking human operators to manually copy files or run CLI commands
Collapsing Proscenium, Vellum, Eidolon, or Mneme boundaries into a monolith
Relying on chat memory instead of durable CFD records
requests: Shape and scope the complete solo-operator platform via Axiom CFD
Integrate Proscenium, Vellum, Eidolon, Mneme, and LCARD
Automate lane delivery and headless Godot verification on dev-ubuntu

plan.title: Control Alt Games Platform & Solo-Operator Workflow Plan
plan.summary: Unified platform plan orchestrating Proscenium (:8788), Vellum (:8770), Eidolon (:7860), Mneme (:8790), LCARD (:8184), and Godot 4.x game runtimes (Field Ops & Threshold Affairs) under Axiom governance.

phases.title: Phase 1: Inter-System Architecture & Proscenium Presentation Contracts
phases.summary: Establish formal API contracts between Proscenium (:8788), Vellum (:8770), Eidolon (:7860), Mneme (:8790), and LCARD (:8184).

tasks.title: Canonize Governing CFD record and Dev Tracker in git
tasks.description: Store governing-inspiration.json and DEV_TRACKER.md in git to preserve context across agent sessions.

tasks.title: Define Proscenium presentation & Hails event payload contract for Field Ops & Threshold Affairs
tasks.description: Establish event trigger contracts for tactical objective Hails (Field Ops) and investigation discovery stingers (Threshold Affairs) sent to POST /api/presentation/products/{product_id}/show.
acceptance: Proscenium event payload documented for Field Ops & Threshold Affairs
Overlay APK display routing contract established

phases.title: Phase 2: Machine-Owned Lane Delivery Engine (vellum-lane-sync)
phases.summary: Build automated background sync worker on dev-ubuntu to deliver published Vellum elements directly to Field Ops and Threshold Affairs project roots.

tasks.title: Build vellum-lane-sync background worker on dev-ubuntu
tasks.description: Create automated daemon/job polling Vellum catalog changes and delivering assets to res://assets/vellum/ in game project checkouts.
acceptance: Assets automatically sync to dev-ubuntu game repos on publish

phases.title: Phase 3: Headless Engine Import & Quality Verification
phases.summary: Automate headless Godot import scanning (godot --headless -e --quit) on dev-ubuntu and report clean imports / errors to /api/ops/pulse.

tasks.title: Build automated headless import scanner for Godot projects
tasks.description: Execute godot --headless on synced game project checkouts, parse import stdout/stderr, and report status to Vellum /api/ops/pulse.
acceptance: Import exceptions surfaced in Vellum and Axiom ops dashboard

phases.title: Phase 4: Proscenium Stage & Presentation Integration for Dobsonian Games
phases.summary: Wire game event stings from Field Ops and Threshold Affairs into Proscenium display targets (overlay-apk / Android TV & room displays).

tasks.title: Wire game event notifications into Proscenium Hails renderer
tasks.description: Connect in-game objective and clue triggers to Proscenium POST /api/presentation/products/hails/show.
acceptance: Field Ops objective triggers render tactical Hails on Proscenium stage
Threshold Affairs discovery triggers render mystery stingers on Proscenium stage

phases.title: Phase 5: Axiom Studio Leaf & Unified Production Briefs
phases.summary: Deliver Axiom Studio Leaf (praxis-games) combining Eidolon concept art, Mneme lore notes, Vellum 3D assets, and Proscenium stage previews.

tasks.title: Deliver Axiom Studio Leaf UI for solo game production
tasks.description: Create Axiom embedded leaf app presenting unified production briefs, Proscenium stage previews, and live game pipeline health.
acceptance: Axiom Studio Leaf registered in config/apps.registry.yaml
Unified production brief view presents Eidolon art + Mneme lore + Vellum assets + Proscenium stage
